message.content:
@startuml

participant "arm_io_storage" as arm
participant "io_storage" as ios
participant "io_fip" as fip
participant "io_memmap" as mem

arm -> arm : arm_io_setup()

group io dev registration
    arm -> fip : register_io_dev_fip(&fip_dev_con)
    fip -> ios : io_register_device(&dev_info_pool[])
    hnote over ios #LightYellow
        devices[dev_count] = (fip_)dev_info_pool
        dev_count++
    end hnote

    arm -> mem : register_io_dev_memmap(&memmap_dev_con)
    mem -> ios : io_register_device(&memmap_dev_info)
    hnote over ios #LightYellow
        devices[dev_count] = memmap_dev_info
        dev_count++
    end hnote
end

arm -> ios : io_dev_open(fip_dev_con, NULL, fip_dev_handle)
ios -> ios : dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)

opt dev_open() on fip device
    ios -> fip : fip_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
    hnote over fip #LightYellow
        dev_info = one of the
        "fip_dev_info" from
        dev_info_pool[]
    end hnote
end

arm -> ios : io_dev_open(memmap_dev_con, NULL, memmap_dev_handle)
ios -> ios : dev_open(dev_con, dev_spec, handle)

opt dev_open() on memmap device
    ios -> mem : memmap_dev_open(dev_spec, dev_info)
    hnote over mem #LightYellow
        dev_info = memmap_dev_info
    end hnote
end

@enduml
